title: Crispy Australian Apple Roll
description: A rich and crispy dish perfect for date nights featuring a low-sodium-friendly twist with mustard in an American grill method.

ingredients.name: Low-Sodium Honey Glaze
ingredients.notes: Mix with 1 tsp lemon juice and a pinch of salt

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Wash and cut 2 medium-sized apples into rounds. Season them with a little bit of salt on both sides.
Grill each apple round for about 4 minutes per side, until they are nicely caramelized but not burnt.
In a small bowl, mix low-sodium mustard paste, honey glaze, and a pinch of salt to make the filling. Spread it evenly inside grilled apples.
Dust the apples with panko breadcrumbs for extra crunchiness.
Serve hot as an appetizer or dessert.
